subject: Santos Banegas Reyes
summary: Santos Banegas Reyes, 42, of Honduras, died September 18, 2025 within 18 hours of ICE custody at Nassau County jail. ICE claims liver failure/alcoholism; family and medical experts dispute this as medically implausible given he was doing construction work day before. ICE missed 90-day report deadline by 110+ days. Family seeking independent autopsy.

key_facts.location: Nassau County Correctional Center, East Meadow, New York
key_facts.family_status: Working construction day before, appeared healthy
key_facts.investigation_status: NY AG review ongoing; ICE report 110+ days overdue
